HERMIT-CONCENTRATION_POWER.description: The next [gold]Dead On[/gold] card you play this turn triggers its effect regardless of position.
HERMIT-CONCENTRATION_POWER.smartDescript: The next [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Dead On[/gold] {Amount:plural:card|cards} you play this turn {Amount:plural:triggers its|trigger their} effects regardless of position.
HERMIT-CONCENTRATION_POWER.title: Concentration
HERMIT-CHEAT_POWER.description: Your next card will trigger its [gold]Dead On[/gold] effect. No matter if it has [gold]Dead On[/gold] or not, this power will be consumed after a card is played.
